sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56917" key="ke/rpaqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κέρπαθος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n56917.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">incense</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2461.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Uran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
